title: Physical properties of the Group 17 elements
summary: 9701 AS — halogen trends in colour, state, and volatility.

simpleExplanation.title: Halogen physical trends
simpleExplanation.summary: Halogens are diatomic molecules with increasing size and van der Waals forces down the group.
steps: F₂ gas, Cl₂ gas, Br₂ liquid, I₂ solid.
F–F weak due to lone pair repulsion.

sections.content: **Group 17 physical properties** (11.1) pairs with **11.2 chemical properties**. Link trends to **IMF and bond enthalpy**.
